## 2026-04-09 Scoring Overrides

These modifiers apply ON TOP of the base rubric in `modes/_shared.md`:

### Hard blockers (auto-SKIP, score capped at 1.5)
- Federal government / DoD / clearance required
- "US citizen only" / "no visa sponsorship"
- Comp below $100K (explicit)
- Comp above $200K but equity-only (no base)
- Role is 100% on-site outside DFW

### Auto-approve (no location penalty)
- Remote
- Irving TX
- Dallas TX
- Fort Worth TX
- Plano TX
- Any DFW city

## Scoring Notes

- **H1B-friendly signals:** "visa sponsorship available", "open to sponsorship", company is known H1B sponsor (top tech, large enterprise), startup with recent funding
- **H1B-unfriendly signals:** no mention of sponsorship on JD + small startup (<50 employees)
- **Apply H1B penalty conservatively:** only apply -0.3 if company is small AND JD says nothing about sponsorship. Large established tech companies (FAANG, Salesforce, etc.) are assumed H1B-friendly.
- **Comp:** If no comp listed, check Glassdoor/Levels.fyi. If market comp for role is in $100-200K range → no penalty. If clearly out of range → hard blocker.

---

## Deal-breakers
- Federal / clearance roles (H1B blocker)
- Pure research roles (no production component)
- Requires relocation outside DFW (hard constraint unless remote)
